text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap stares intensely at a magazine in her hands.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Wow... That sea urchin's glistening like liquid gold over a plate of
pasta... It looks more like treasure than it does food...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And those warm pancakes look like they'd go perfectly with that
vanilla ice cream... Not to mention all the fresh fruit. Such an
exquisite dish...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I was looking for a place to eat on my next day off. There
are so many options though. It took forever for me to decide...
choice_data_list: So you found a place you like?
So you found a place you like?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I did. Apparently, it's some small, hidden cafe known for its pasta and
pancakes.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's just... The other day, I saw an ad for a similarly hidden ramen shop
and thought I could find my way there...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But I got hopelessly lost, even though I used a map and everything. I
could've sworn I had gotten on the right train...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I guess they aren't called hidden for nothing. It's no small feat finding
your way there.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Could it be these shops are disguising themselves and hiding
from public eyes?
choice_data_list:
Disguising themselves? They're not ninja
shops...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Then why is it that I wasn't able to reach my destination?
Truly a mystery.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking a look at the magazine's map, I notice that it's a bit difficult to
navigate. I'm not sure if Oguri Cap would be able to find her way
there by herself...
choice_data_list: How about I go with you?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Really?! You'd do that?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
With you by my side, I'm sure we'll get there without a problem. I'll
gladly take you up on that offer, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next day off rolls around, and after a short train ride, we find
ourselves standing in front of the tucked-away cafe.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So this is where it is... You sure know your way around town. Not even
a single wrong turn.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing... I just feel a bit out of place... I mean, look around you!
It's so fancy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Is it okay for me to be dressed like this? I heard some restaurants in
the city kick you out if you're dressed poorly...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I see... That's a relief to hear, but... I still feel like I'm somehow
standing out...

text_block_list.name: Waitress A
text_block_list.text: Are you ready to order?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ah, umm... Let's see... What was I gonna order, again?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's it. I forgot what they're called though... Some
hard-to-remember names...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
They were both in French, I think... One of them was a sea urchin
pasta...
choice_data_list:
We'll have two plates of sea urchin pasta, thank
you.

text_block_list.name: Waitress A
text_block_list.text: Ah, the "lumière dorèe" pâtes à la crème.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So you can order without knowing the dish's actual name... I see.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but could we also get two servings of those pancakes topped
with fresh fruit?

text_block_list.name: Waitress A
text_block_list.text: Two crêpes aux fruits. Very well.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Did you see that? I ordered something on my own!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unaccustomed to fancy eateries, Oguri Cap seems a bit on edge at
first. Her anxiety, however, vanishes along with her food.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That was delicious. So many flavors I didn't even know existed. Each
bite was absolutely divine, but they'd last only a second...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hey, I have an idea. Why don't we get seconds?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Our meal ended too soon. I feel like I can eat some more, and since
we're already here...
choice_data_list:
Let's do it! But how about we try something
else?

Let's do it! But how about we try something
else?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Something... else? Now that you mention it, that does sound nice...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The pasta and pancakes were both amazing. I'm sure everything else
on the menu wouldn't disappoint.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The question is... What do I order next? A dilemma more difficult
than any school exam...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap sits at the table, flipping through the menu for about half
an hour.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, I can't decide! Everything looks good! Looking at the menu just
makes me want to order it all!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Wait... Maybe I'll do exactly that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Let's order everything on the menu. What do you say?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Too much, huh? Then could you at least order for me? What are you
feeling?
choice_data_list: The hamburger steak pie sounds delicious.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... I've never tried that before.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
All right, sounds good. Might as well try it while we're here, right? I'll
order the food.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bubbling with childlike excitement, Oguri Cap raises her hand to call
over the waitress, ordering a "beef pie thing" for the two of us.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The pie crust is nice and crispy, and the balance of sweetness and
acidity in the berry sauce is perfect! Not to mention the super juicy
patty...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy, I feel like I could be dreaming.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't too sure about eating meat with a fruity sauce, but this was
better than I imagined.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the recommendation. I would never have tried something
like this if it weren't for you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's nice to get out of my comfort zone once in a while and eat what
other people like!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for today. The food was fantastic, and I had a bunch of
fun.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's good to hear. This day couldn't be any better.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: All right. On to our next destination.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I usually only go to nearby places when I'm alone, but since you said
you'd show me around, I wanna make the most of it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I highlighted a couple other shops that caught my eye while I was
preparing for this trip.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It might not be lunchtime anymore, but judging by the state of my
stomach, I could stop by at least 10 more spots.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Since we're going to spend the entire day cafe hopping, I'll be
counting on you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap quickly picks up her pace, and we end up popping into
every single cafe on her list...
